---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for chrome-download-manager
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

SUMMARY

A short description of the feature you want.

MOTIVATION

Why this feature would be useful. Describe the problem it solves or the use case it supports.

PROPOSED SOLUTION

How you think this could work. Include API examples if applicable.

ALTERNATIVES CONSIDERED

Any other approaches you thought about and why they are less ideal.

ADDITIONAL CONTEXT

Any other information, mockups, or references that help explain the request.
